about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Experienced expert team
about.ceo_desc: IT expert with nearly 20 years of experience

about.specialty_desc: Banking digital transformation, solution architect, large-scale IT project management.
about.mission_desc: Bring international knowledge and experience to Vietnam, helping SMEs access modern technology at reasonable costs.

about.value2_desc: Optimize costs for businesses, ensuring high ROI with effective and sustainable solutions.
about.value3_desc: Accompany customers from consultation to implementation and long-term maintenance.
about.why_subtitle: We don't just provide services - we create real value
about.advantage1_desc: No ready-made templates - each project is designed specifically for your needs

about.advantage4_desc: Compliant with international security standards, 24/7 customer data protection

about.advantage6_desc: Not just software development - we help your business grow comprehensively
